# Calibrating The Panel Saw

## Sliding stops \- Basic Reset

1. Reset all stops to their home position   
   1. Far left stop lives hard to the static section of the rail and locked  
      ![][image1]  
   2. Middle stop lives Hard to the Left Stop  
      ![][image2]  
   3. Right stop lives Hard to the right of the rail  
      ![][image3]  
2. Press and hold Centre and Left Button to set the position to the default reading

Parallel fence

- Settings cog  
- Calibration  
- Quotas correction  
- Use offcut with known width, calipers  
- Confirm fence readout is same

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image2]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image3]: <data:image/png;base64,>
